source_jobs.title: Financial Modelling Specialist
source_jobs.description:
At Gratia, we believe potential is globally distributed, but opportunity is not. Our mission is to turn great talent's potential into fulfilling global careers through professional development and tech-enabled platforms. We bridge the gap between ambitious companies and hands-on experts who deliver real results instead of just theoretical plans.

In this role, you aren’t just filling out spreadsheets—you are building the technical tools that steer global organizations. You will be matched with projects that require hands-on builds of integrated models, valuations, and forecasting dashboards for clients like USA Today Co. and Endeavor.




WHY JOIN GRATIA'S NETWORK?

 - High-impact projects: Work directly with companies like Apollo and Endeavor, solving real operational challenges—not theoretical exercises.

 - Flexibility & autonomy: Choose projects that match your expertise and availability. Work remotely, set your own rhythm, and grow your portfolio across industries.

 - Apprenticeship & growth: A curated pathway combining high-value projects with mentorship. Move from "doing" to "leading" through real work.

 - Community of top talent: Join a network of experienced specialists who collaborate across disciplines on complex engagements.
   
   


WHAT YOU’LL BE DOING

 - Model building: Build and scale driver-based 3-statement models (P&L, Balance Sheet, Cash Flow) and multi-year projections.

 - Valuation analysis: Perform company and asset valuations using DCF frameworks, comparable company analysis, and precedent transactions.

 - Scenario & risk testing: Design "what-if" frameworks and sensitivity analysis to quantify risk and upside for stakeholders.

 - Data-driven analysis: Use financial math and modelling techniques to provide technical clarity for market entry, operations, or fundraising.

 - Deliverable ownership: Ensure every cell is accurate, logic is transparent, and every visual output is clear for the end-user.




WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

 - Professional experience in financial modelling, typically gained within investment banking, private equity, or corporate finance environments.

 - Experience from MBB (McKinsey, Bain, BCG), Big 4, or another recognized firm is a plus.

 - Comfort with 3-statement integration, DCF valuations, and data tables. Senior-level candidates should demonstrate mastery of complex risk-quantification and advanced simulations.

 - The ability to transform messy, raw data into structured and logical business solutions.

 - You thrive when given a spec and expected to deliver a production-ready model with minimal oversight.

 - Exceptional communication skills; you must be able to document your assumptions and explain your model logic clearly.




RANGE OF DELIVERABLES

This is a tiered role; your specific level will be determined during our conversations based on your technical skills, professional journey, and your readiness to manage client relationships.

 - Junior: Budget templates, revenue/cost projections, and variance analysis.

 - Intermediate: Fully integrated 3-statement models and scenario dashboards.

 - Advanced: Complex LBO/M&A models and risk-quantification simulations.
   
   


WHY GRATIA IS YOUR NEXT STEP

 - This is a long-term contract/freelance role designed for independent professionals who want the freedom of private practice without the isolation of working alone.

 - We offer both part-time and full-time engagement options.

 - Compensation is tailored to your expertise.

 - Elevate your profile by working directly with leaders at innovative global organizations like Gannett and Portrait Analytics.

source_jobs.title: Business Analyst
source_jobs.description:
At Gratia, we believe potential is globally distributed, but opportunity is not. We bridge the gap between ambitious companies and hands-on analysts who deliver real results through a tech-enabled, apprenticeship-based platform. We focus on rigorous execution, maintaining an 88.2 NPS by supporting global partners like USA Today Co. and New York Life with precise, actionable insights.

We are a remote-first community designed for professionals who value both excellence and autonomy.




WHY JOIN GRATIA?

 - Flexibility and autonomy: Work with top-tier clients globally while designing a professional rhythm that suits your life. Fair global compensation meets real flexibility.

 - Apprenticeship and growth: A curated pathway combining high-value projects with mentorship. Move from Associate Business Analyst to Lead through real work, not just theory.

 - Community of top talent: Join a supportive network where you can share knowledge, access opportunities, and develop deep expertise to earn specialist designations in high-demand domains.
   
   


THE BUSINESS ANALYST TRACK

We are looking for specialists who are eager to solve problems alongside our project teams. This is a tiered role; your specific level will be determined during our conversations based on your technical skills, professional journey, and your readiness to manage client relationships.

 - Associate (A2): Deliver reliable quality on standard projects, communicate directly with senior members, and navigate complex situations with curiosity.

 - Analyst (A3): Design innovative approaches for complex challenges, exercise sound business judgment, build relationships with clients, and support the growth of junior analysts.

 - Senior (A4): Serve as a recognized SME. You handle the most intricate challenges, set quality standards, and maintain board-level relationships.
   
   


WHAT YOU’LL BE DOING

We look for individuals with transferable skills or direct experience in at least two of the following areas. Our projects are dynamic, and we encourage you to expand your toolkit as you grow with us:

 - Financial Modeling & Analytics: From building 3-Statement models and DCF valuations to scenario-based forecasting, M&A analysis, and Monte Carlo simulations.

 - Go-to-Market & RevOps: Optimizing sales processes, CRM configurations, and growth planning to drive revenue.

 - Process Design & Automation: Mapping workflows and implementing tools like Zapier/Make to build high-efficiency systems.

 - Data Analytics & Visualizations: Transforming complex datasets into Tableau/Power BI visualizations and ML-powered insights.

 - Market Intelligence: Conducting TAM/SAM/SOM analysis, competitive research, and crafting industry-specific narratives.

 - Narrative & Design: Developing investor-ready decks, executive presentations, and high-stakes visual communication.

 - Business Planning & Growth: Developing corporate roadmaps, conducting SWOT analyses, and building growth frameworks or risk assessments.

 - Project Management & Delivery: Planning and executing complex initiatives, managing everything from risk registers and resource allocation to stakeholder alignment.




WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR




CORE COMPETENCIES:

 - Decision excellence: The ability to structure challenges and develop actionable solutions.

 - Business acumen: A solid grasp of business models and how analysis connects to real-world outcomes.

 - Execution mastery: Delivering "Reference-Quality" work that is accurate, timely, and polished.

 - Stakeholder impact: Communicating with clarity and presence across all levels of an organization.

 - Flexibility & agility: A steep learning curve on new tools and the ability to thrive in evolving environments.
   
   


QUALIFICATIONS:

We value a blend of technical capability and adaptive thinking:

 - Experience leading client conversations and providing high-level guidance.

 - Experience from MBB (McKinsey, Bain, BCG), Big 4, or another recognized firm is a hug

source_jobs.title: Analyst (Aerospace & Defense)
source_jobs.description:
At Gratia, we believe potential is globally distributed, but opportunity is not. Our mission is to turn great talent's potential into fulfilling global careers through professional development and tech-enabled platforms. We bridge the gap between ambitious companies and hands-on experts who deliver real results instead of just theoretical plans.

Gratia is a remote-first, apprenticeship-based platform where opportunity is defined by what you can do and deliver. Our clients include global names like USA Today Co., Endeavor, and New York Life. We maintain an 88.2 Net Promoter Score because we focus on rigorous execution, not just high-level advice.




We are currently staffing for a new engagement supporting a specialized advisory firm. In this role, you will serve as the primary analytical resource for deep-dive financial research within the Aerospace & Defense (A&D) and Maintenance, Repair, and Overhaul (MRO) supply chains.




WHAT YOU'LL BE DOING

 - Review and cross-check complex financial figures across full company reports to identify inconsistencies and reporting errors.

 - Conduct thorough financial and operational analysis focused on aviation, defense systems, and MRO supply chains.

 - Write clear, concise executive summaries that translate raw financial data and discrepancies into easy-to-understand insights.

 - Analyze historical financial performance to support strategic decision-making and business evaluations.
   
   


WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

 - Direct experience in the Aerospace & Defense sector

 - 4+ years of analyst experience with deep fluency in reading and interpreting financial statements. Experience from an MBB (McKinsey, Bain, BCG), Big 4, or another recognised firm is a plus.

 - Proven ability to cross-check figures and spot errors across lengthy financial reports and synthesize complex discrepancies into clear executive narratives.

 - A flexible schedule that allows for a consistent daily overlap with US business hours.




WHY GRATIA IS YOUR NEXT STEP

 - Flexible freelance model: This is a long-term contract/freelance role designed for independent professionals who want the freedom of private practice without the isolation of working alone. We offer both part-time and full-time engagement options.

 - Experience-based rates: Compensation is tailored to your expertise.

 - A clear path forward: We believe in moving from "doing" to "leading." You’ll have a defined trajectory to gain specialized expertise and leadership skills.

notes: Multiple duplicate job postings, unclear if tech-enabled platform is core business
